attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
-8888 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-8888 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSAL.PRODUCT_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 -9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 -999 END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSAL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE ='QTC' THEN -9994 WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -9993 END  DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
(CASE WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE = 'UO' THEN
    -996
    WHEN NSAL.SS_CODE = 'BO' THEN
    -997
  END) GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NSAL.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  -9999 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
  NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  NSAL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  'UNKNO' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
  NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
  NULL DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
   -999 BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   CAST(NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
   NULL DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 'REMARKETING INVOICES' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 NULL DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 NSAL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME AS AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 'SLS_ADJ' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 'Y' DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
NSAL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
NSAL.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
NSAL.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
NSAL.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
Cast(0.000000 As Decimal(18,6)) AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE(Cast(TRIM(NSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT) As Decimal(18,6)),0.000000) AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
COALESCE(Cast(TRIM(NSAL.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT) As Decimal(18,6)),0.000000) AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
NSAL.EDW_CREATE_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
NSAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
NSAL.EDW_UPDATE_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NSAL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT NSA
ON (NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT AND      
NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE = 'RF') AND NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_ID 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_RF' AND JOB_GROUP_ID = 'EDWTD_REV_MEASURE')
